SNECKODOWNFALL-ACE_OF_WANDS.description:
Whenever you apply a debuff to an enemy, gain {AceOfWandsPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Gift[/gold]: Debuff.
SNECKODOWNFALL-ACE_OF_WANDS.title: Queen of Pentacles
SNECKODOWNFALL-AMASS.description:
Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain additional [gold]Block[/gold] equal to {IfUpgraded:show:twice the|the} total Energy cost of your [gold]Hand[/gold].
SNECKODOWNFALL-AMASS.title: Amass
SNECKODOWNFALL-BEHOLD.title: Behold!
SNECKODOWNFALL-BELITTLE.description:
Enemy loses {InCombat:{HpLoss:diff()}|{HpLossExtra:diff()}} HP for each unique debuff they have.
[gold]Gift[/gold]: Uncommon Debuff.
SNECKODOWNFALL-BELITTLE.title: Belittle
SNECKODOWNFALL-BEYOND_ARMOR.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Put {Cards:diff()} random [gold]Offclass[/gold] cards from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
[gold]Gift[/gold]: Common.
SNECKODOWNFALL-BEYOND_ARMOR.title: Beyond Armor
SNECKODOWNFALL-BLUNDERBUS.title: Blunderbus
SNECKODOWNFALL-BLUNDER_GUARD.description: Whenever you play a card that costs {Energy:energyIcons()} or more, gain {BlunderGuardBlockPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] and {BlunderGuardStrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
SNECKODOWNFALL-BLUNDER_GUARD.title: Blunder Guard
SNECKODOWNFALL-CHEAP_STOCK.description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Muddle[/gold] the {IfUpgraded:show:{CheapStockPower:diff()} highest|highest} cost {CheapStockPower:plural:card|cards} in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
SNECKODOWNFALL-CHEAP_STOCK.title: Cheap Stock
SNECKODOWNFALL-COBRA_COIL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Enemy takes {ConstrictedPower:diff()} damage at the end of each of its turns.
[gold]Gift[/gold]: Rare Attack.
SNECKODOWNFALL-COBRA_COIL.title: Cobra Coil
SNECKODOWNFALL-COMBO_STRING.title: Combo String
SNECKODOWNFALL-DEFEND_SNECKO.title: Defend
SNECKODOWNFALL-MOCK_CHARACTER_CHOICE_CAR: {Characters.StringValue:cond:[gold]{Characters}[/gold]|The selected character}'s card will be added to your [gold]Gift[/gold] card pool.
{Characters.StringValue:cond:[gold]{Characters}[/gold]|The selected character}'s card will be added to your [gold]Gift[/gold] card pool.
SNECKODOWNFALL-SNEK_BITE.title: Snek Bite
SNECKODOWNFALL-STRIKE_SNECKO.title: Strike
SNECKODOWNFALL-SOUL_ROLL.title: Soul Roll
SNECKODOWNFALL-TAIL_WHIP.title: Tail Whip
